name: Ampoc Far-East Co., Ltd.
summary: Ampoc Far-East Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells equipment and materials for the electronic industry in Taiwan. Its products have applications in printed circuit boards, FPD and touch panels, IC packaging, light emitting diode and OLED, solar cells, IC wafers and substrates, passive devices and components, MEMS, consumables and others, and inspection tools. The company provides its products in Mainland China and Hong Kong through its service centers and distribution channels. AMPOC Far-East Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
